scripts.generate:data: uv run --with fasttext --with numpy python scripts/generate-data.py
scripts.dev: npm run seed:daily:local && wrangler pages dev public --compatibility-date=2026-06-10 --port 8788 --ip 127.0.0.1
scripts.deploy:pages: wrangler pages deploy public --project-name relating-game --branch master
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:pages && npm run deploy:daily
